display_text: Aegis of the Immortal. Tier Unique / Non-Purchasable: Brings your hero back to life with full health and mana at the location of death after a 5-second delay. The reincarnation effect must be activated within 5 minutes of receiving the Aegis; if the timer expires, it heals you for 5 seconds (dispelled by damage). A powerful game-ending objective that denies enemy teams a key kill. Stats: Reincarnation Delay: 5s, Buff Duration: 300s (5 minutes).
